title: GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services include: general medical exams and well baby/child checks 528 E Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 575-0429 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, and most private insurances, also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Insurnace information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Grant County Services: General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Public Clinics Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - VITAL RECORDS HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - STD CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PUBLIC HEALTH MODERNIZATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INFORMATION SERVICES - TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
